$comment: Unattended permission path for the Producer background worker (ADR-0004; issue #8). The Magnific spike (docs/producer-spikes-results.md) found that spaces_edit / spaces_run are auto-denied by the permission classifier as 'modifying shared infrastructure' and need per-call approval EVEN WITH verbal consent. A headless queue worker (drain + periodic tick) stalls without a permission path. This allowlist grants the worker non-auto permission to those tools so it can drive the Space unattended. It is scoped to the Producer's pre-defined Space and to the two Space-mutating tools only; everything else stays on the default classifier. See docs/producer-worker-permissions.md.

scope.note: The Producer's pre-defined 'JSON master' cast->clips Space. The worker drives ONLY this Space.
